book: The First Ecumenical Council: The First Council of Nice.

classification.cautionReason: Conciliar or creedal material received in mainstream Nicene Christian tradition, with denominational differences on some canons.

lineage: The First Ecumenical Council: The First Council of Nice.
title: The Nicene Creed.

verses.book: The First Ecumenical Council: The First Council of Nice.
verses.text: (Found in the Acts of the Ecumenical Councils of Ephesus and Chalcedon, in the Epistle of Eusebius of Cæsarea to his own Church, in the Epistle of St. Athanasius Ad Jovianum Imp., in the Ecclesiastical Histories of Theodoret and Socrates, and elsewhere, The variations in the text are absolutely without importance.)

verses.book: The First Ecumenical Council: The First Council of Nice.
verses.text: The Synod at Nice set forth this Creed.

verses.book: The First Ecumenical Council: The First Council of Nice.
verses.text: The Ecthesis of the Synod at Nice.

verses.book: The First Ecumenical Council: The First Council of Nice.
verses.text: We believe in one God, the Father Almighty, maker of all things visible and invisible; and in one Lord Jesus Christ, the Son of God, the only-begotten of his Father, of the substance of the Father, God of God, Light of Light, very God of very God, begotten (γεννηθέντα), not made, being of one substance (ὁμοούσιον, consubstantialem) with the Father.

verses.book: The First Ecumenical Council: The First Council of Nice.
verses.text: By whom all things were made, both which be in heaven and in earth.

verses.book: The First Ecumenical Council: The First Council of Nice.
verses.text: Who for us men and for our salvation came down [from heaven] and was incarnate and was made man.

verses.book: The First Ecumenical Council: The First Council of Nice.
verses.text: He suffered and the third day he rose again, and ascended into heaven.

verses.book: The First Ecumenical Council: The First Council of Nice.
verses.text: And he shall come again to judge both the quick and the dead.

verses.book: The First Ecumenical Council: The First Council of Nice.
verses.text: And [we believe] in the Holy Ghost.

verses.book: The First Ecumenical Council: The First Council of Nice.
verses.text: And whosoever shall say that there was a time when the Son of God was not (ἤν ποτε ὅτε οὐκ ἦν), or that before he was begotten he was not, or that he was made of things that were not, or that he is of a different substance or essence [from the Father] or that he is a creature, or subject to change or conversion—all that so say, the Catholic and Apostolic Church anathematizes them.

verses.book: The First Ecumenical Council: The First Council of Nice.
verses.text: The Creed of Eusebius of Cæsarea, which he presented to the council, and which some suppose to have suggested the creed finally adopted.

verses.book: The First Ecumenical Council: The First Council of Nice.
verses.text: (Found in his Epistle to his diocese; vide: St. Athanasius and Theodoret.)

verses.book: The First Ecumenical Council: The First Council of Nice.
verses.text: We believe in one only God, Father Almighty, Creator of things visible and invisible; and in the Lord Jesus Christ, for he is the Word of God, God of God, Light of Light, life of life, his only Son, the first-born of all creatures, begotten of the Father before all time, by whom also everything was created, who became flesh for our redemption, who lived and suffered amongst men, rose again the third day, returned to the Father, and will come again one day in his glory to judge the quick and the dead.

verses.book: The First Ecumenical Council: The First Council of Nice.
verses.text: We believe also in the Holy Ghost.

verses.book: The First Ecumenical Council: The First Council of Nice.
verses.text: We believe that each of these three is and subsists; the Father truly as Father, the Son truly as Son, the Holy Ghost truly as Holy Ghost; as our Lord also said, when he sent his disciples to preach: Go and teach all nations, and baptize them in the name of the Father, and of the Son, and of the Holy Ghost.
